booking.content: We minimize waste and implement a Zero-Waste principle in our kitchen, ensuring efficient use of ingredients and reducing our environmental impact. Choosing plant-based cuisine helps support agriculture, conserve water, and reduce greenhouse gas emissions.
booking.title: All our dishes are created with care <italic>for the planet</italic>

info.content: Welcome to Organica, your destination for tasty healthy dining. Here, you never have to choose between delicious and nutritious. Our menu offers something for everyone — dishes that not only satisfy your taste buds but also nourish your body. We create delicious meals that pave the way to your health and longevity.
info.title:
Discover a wholesome

plant-based cuisine

menu.label: Organic dishes that retain all the natural goodness for your well-being.
menu.title:
Plant-based cuisine

inspired by Nature

mission.content: We strive to share our knowledge about the benefits of plant-based nutrition and show you how to make it a part of your life. We also aim to demonstrate how proper planning and improving your diet can lead to positive physical, mental, and spiritual outcomes.
mission.item1: We ensure the highest quality of our dishes through careful ingredient selection and their reasonable use.
mission.item2: We enrich our dishes with a variety of superfoods — ashwagandha, maca, chia, CBD, and more — making them even more healthy and nutritious.
mission.item3: Each dish on our menu is thoughtfully crafted to provide a balanced mix of fats, proteins, carbohydrates, and essential macro- and micronutrients.
mission.item4: We prepare all our dishes in-house, using only fresh ingredients — no processed foods or synthetic additives.
mission.item5: We use only fresh, organic ingredients, sourcing them from local farmers who grow their produce with respect for the environment.
mission.title:
Our Values

and Purpose

principles.item1: We prepare vegetables quickly and simply, preserving their natural essence — vibrant colors, fresh flavors, and crisp textures — along with their nutritional value to support your health.
principles.item2: Fruits are healthiest when eaten raw. We soak grains and legumes in advance and cook them thoroughly in high-quality, clean water.
principles.item3: Plant-based fats, essential for nutrient absorption and flavor enhancement, are added at the end of cooking. The same applies to herbs, which are important for aiding and stimulating digestion.
principles.item4: Spices are added first when cooking. Their role is to aid digestion, stimulate the digestive system, and support other essential functions of the body.
principles.item5: Spices are added first when cooking. Their role is to aid digestion, stimulate the digestive system, and support other essential functions of the body.
principles.title:
Our Cooking

Philosophy

vision.content: Our concept of plant-based cuisine was born from a desire to inspire everyone toward a healthy lifestyle. It’s well known that food affects every aspect of human life — physical health, mental clarity, and emotional well-being. By choosing nutritious plant-based dishes, you enhance your health and overall quality of life.
vision.label: Our vision
vision.title:
We know that food

can heal

harmony.sectionLabel:
Discover the value and power of living

plant-based cuisine
harmony.title:
Savor the benefits

in every dish

info.about: Our restaurant is a place where caring for human and planetary health becomes a part of every dish. We support local farmers, adhere to the principles of sustainable development, and provide high-quality dishes that contribute to the well-being of our guests.
info.mission: Our mission is to demonstrate how living plant food heals the body, mind and brings pleasure! Our vision is to be a space where every dish fills you with energy, restores health and opens the way to longevity. Organic Restaurant was created by healthy lifestyle enthusiasts who have experienced firsthand that living plant foods replace medicines and slow down aging, has a positive effect on the mental state and leads to elevated thoughts.
info.title:
Health begins

with plant-based food

menu.content: Every dish on our menu is carefully crafted with a balanced mix of fats, proteins, carbohydrates, and both macro and micronutrients. We ensure the highest quality by carefully selecting our ingredients and using them thoughtfully. All the ingredients we use are always organic and fresh.

nature.content: We founded Organica restaurant to change the way plant-based cuisine is perceived, showcasing its diversity and potential. We are excited to introduce our guests to new approaches to eating habits and share deep insights into the benefits of plant-based food. We study the latest global research in healthy eating to ensure our dishes provide the maximum health benefits.
nature.title:
With love for nature,

with care for you

policyPage.title:
Privacy

Policy
policyPage.about: This Privacy Policy describes how the healthy food restaurant Organica (hereinafter — "we", "our", "the restaurant") collects, uses, and protects users' personal information (hereinafter — "you", "user") on the website https://organica.com.ua/ (hereinafter — "Website").
policyPage.sectionIntro-1: We may collect the following information:

sectionList-1.item4: Delivery address (if you place an online order)
sectionList-1.item6: Cookies and website usage data (via Google Analytics or other tools)

policyPage.sectionIntro-2: Collected information may be used for:
policyPage.sectionIntro-3: We take the security of users’ personal data seriously and apply all necessary measures to protect it.
policyPage.sectionIntro-3-1: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, specifically:

sectionList-3-1.item1: order data — up to 1 year after order completion;
sectionList-3-1.item2: newsletter data — until you withdraw your consent;
sectionList-3-1.item3: analytical data — up to 24 months (e.g., Google Analytics).

policyPage.sectionClose-3-1: After the retention period expires, data will be securely deleted or anonymized.

sectionList-3-2.item1: on secure servers of our hosting provider within the European Union or Ukraine;
sectionList-3-2.item2: in internal CRM systems or databases accessible only to authorized personnel.

policyPage.sectionClose-3-2: We do not transfer data outside the European Economic Area without appropriate legal safeguards (e.g., standard contractual clauses under the GDPR).
policyPage.sectionIntro-3-3: To protect personal data, we have implemented the following measures:

sectionList-3-3.item1: SSL/HTTPS for secure connection between the website and your browser;
sectionList-3-3.item2: Two-factor authentication for access to administrative systems;
sectionList-3-3.item4: Access restrictions to personal data limited to employees who require it for their duties;
sectionList-3-3.item5: Antivirus protection and DDoS mitigation (via hosting platform);
sectionList-3-3.item6: Security audits — periodic vulnerability checks of our systems.

policyPage.sectionTitle-3-4: 3.4. In Case of Data Breach or Security Incident
policyPage.sectionIntro-3-4: If we detect a security breach that may impact your personal data, we commit to:

sectionList-3-4.item1: notify you as soon as possible (no later than 72 hours);
sectionList-3-4.item3: take actions to mitigate damage and prevent further incidents.

policyPage.sectionIntro-4: We do not sell, transfer, or disclose your personal data to third parties without your explicit consent, except as described in this Policy or as required by law.
policyPage.sectionIntro-4-1: We may share your personal data with third parties who help us deliver our services, specifically:

sectionList-4-1.item1: Delivery services (e.g., courier or food delivery companies) — for order fulfillment;
sectionList-4-1.item2: Payment systems (e.g., LiqPay, WayForPay, Stripe, or others) — for processing online payments. Please note that we do not store your card data — transactions are securely handled through partner gateways;
sectionList-4-1.item3: Website support partners — only to the extent needed for administration or technical troubleshooting;
sectionList-4-1.item4: CRM or email services (e.g., eSputnik, Mailchimp) — for managing subscriptions, promotions, and personalized offers.

policyPage.sectionClose-4-1: All third parties are required to maintain confidentiality and use the data solely to provide their respective services.
policyPage.sectionIntro-4-2: We use third-party analytics tools, such as Google Analytics, Meta Pixel (Facebook Pixel), and others, which may collect anonymized technical data about your interaction with the website (device type, browser, pages visited, etc.).
policyPage.sectionClose-4-2: This data does not identify you personally, but helps us analyze user behavior and improve site functionality.
policyPage.sectionIntro-4-3: We may disclose your data to third parties in the following situations:

sectionList-4-3.item1: When required by law (e.g., court order or law enforcement request);
sectionList-4-3.item2: If necessary to protect our rights, property, or the safety of users or third parties;
sectionList-4-3.item3: To comply with tax or other regulatory obligations.

policyPage.sectionIntro-4-4: If data is transferred outside Ukraine or the European Economic Area, we ensure that such transfer is carried out in accordance with legal requirements, including standard contractual clauses or other lawful mechanisms.
policyPage.sectionIntro-5: We respect your right to data protection and enable you to exercise your rights under the Law of Ukraine on Personal Data Protection and, where applicable, the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
policyPage.sectionIntro-5-1: You have the right to obtain confirmation as to whether your personal data is being processed, and access to the data along with information about:

sectionList-5-1.item4: recipients or categories of recipients of the data;
sectionList-5-1.item5: retention periods or criteria for determining them.

policyPage.sectionIntro-5-2: If your data is inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated, you have the right to request its correction or completion.
policyPage.sectionTitle-5-3: 5.3. Right to Erasure (“Right to Be Forgotten”)
policyPage.sectionIntro-5-3: You have the right to request the deletion of your personal data if:

sectionList-5-3.item1: it is no longer needed for the purposes it was collected;
sectionList-5-3.item2: you have withdrawn consent and there is no other legal basis for processing;
sectionList-5-3.item4: deletion is required to comply with a legal obligation.

policyPage.sectionIntro-5-4: You may request restriction of processing in the following cases:

sectionList-5-4.item1: you contest the accuracy of the data — for the period of verification;
sectionList-5-4.item2: processing is unlawful, but you do not want the data to be erased;
sectionList-5-4.item3: we no longer need the data, but you require it for legal claims;
sectionList-5-4.item4: you object to the processing — pending the verification of legitimate grounds.

policyPage.sectionIntro-5-5: You have the right to object to the processing of your data if it is based on our legitimate interests, including profiling or marketing.
policyPage.sectionIntro-5-6: In applicable cases, you have the right to receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used format and transmit it to another controller.
policyPage.sectionIntro-5-7: If you have given consent to the processing of personal data, you may withdraw it at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing before withdrawal.
policyPage.sectionIntro-5-8: If you believe your rights have been violated, you have the right to file a complaint:

sectionList-5-8.item1: to the Ukrainian Parliament Commissioner for Human Rights;
sectionList-5-8.item2: to the relevant EU supervisory authority (if GDPR applies);
sectionList-5-8.item3: or take legal action to protect your rights.

policyPage.section2-5-8: To exercise any of the above rights, you may contact us in writing or via email:
policyPage.sectionClose-5-8: We will process your request within 30 calendar days of receipt. If necessary, the period may be extended, and you will be informed accordingly.
policyPage.sectionIntro-6: We may periodically update this Privacy Policy. All changes will be published on this page with the updated date.

termsPage.title:
Terms of

Use of the Website
termsPage.about1: These Terms of Use (hereinafter referred to as the “Terms”) govern the use of the website https://organica.com.ua/ (hereinafter referred to as the “Website”), owned by Organica (hereinafter “We”, “Our Restaurant”, or “Administration”). By using the Website, you agree to these Terms.
termsPage.about2: If you do not agree with these Terms — please do not use the Website.
termsPage.sectionIntro-1: The Website has been created to:

sectionList-1.item1: provide information about the restaurant’s menu, services, and location;
sectionList-1.item3: share news, promotions, and upcoming events;
sectionList-1.item5: support delivery and online payment features (if available).

termsPage.sectionIntro-2: All content on the Website — including texts, images, logos, design, and recipes — is either the property of the restaurant or used with proper legal authorization.

sectionList-2.item1: copy, distribute, or modify any materials without written consent from the Administration;
sectionList-2.item2: use our brand or content for commercial purposes without permission.

termsPage.sectionIntro-3: When placing an order through the Website, you:

sectionList-3.item1: agree to provide accurate and truthful information (such as contact details, delivery address, etc.);
sectionList-3.item2: confirm that you are authorized to make payments (if the order is paid);
sectionList-3.item3: understand that your order is considered confirmed only after a call from our operator or automatic confirmation.

termsPage.sectionIntro-3-1: We reserve the right to refuse order fulfillment in cases of:
termsPage.sectionIntro-4: By using the Website, you agree to our Privacy Policy, which governs the collection, processing, and protection of your personal data.
termsPage.sectionIntro-5: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. For more details, please refer to our “Cookie Policy”.

sectionList-6.item1: temporary unavailability of the Website due to technical reasons;
sectionList-6.item2: loss or damage of data resulting from external interference;
sectionList-6.item3: actions of third parties (delivery services, payment systems) involved in processing your order.

termsPage.sectionIntro-6-1: You agree to use the Website responsibly and refrain from any actions that may disrupt its operation or affect other users.
termsPage.sectionIntro-7: The Website may contain links to third-party services (such as Google Maps, delivery services, payment platforms, etc.). We are not responsible for the content or privacy policies of these external sites.
termsPage.sectionIntro-8: We reserve the right to update these Terms without prior notice. The current version will always be available on this page. By continuing to use the Website after changes are made, you automatically agree to the updated Terms.
termsPage.sectionIntro-9: If you have any questions regarding these Terms of Use, feel free to contact us:

usefulSection.text: We've prepared the latest news, engaging articles, and delicious recipes to inspire you toward a healthy lifestyle.
